figures.caption: Fig. 4. Comparison of Class Occurrence Between reBEN and Sentinel2Cap

Fig. 1. Examples from Sentinel2Cap showing multimodal image patches (MSI, SAR, and RGB) with decreasing semantic complexity (12, 10, 6, and 2 land-cover classes) and their corresponding human-annotated captions, illustrating the dataset’s emphasis on semantically rich scenes and high-quality manual annotation.

TABLE I OVERVIEW OF REMOTE SENSING CAPTIONING DATASETS. ✓ / ✗ INDICATE THE AVAILABILITY OF SAR, OPTICAL DATA, AND HUMAN-WRITTEN CAPTIONS. Sentinel2Cap IS HIGHLIGHTED AS THE ONLY DATASET COMBINING MULTIMODAL SAR+OPTICAL DATA WITH HUMAN-ANNOTATED CAPTIONS AT MEDIUM RESOLUTION.
